← All ECHO examples

ECHO — competitor without echoStartingTcf is rejected from the fleet

Scoring system: ECHO    α (blend factor): 0.25 
ECHO requires every competitor to have an opening handicap before scoring.
A boat without `echoStartingTcf` is rejected with reason `no_starting_tcf`
and excluded from per-race scores and from the series standings.
echoStartingTcf intentionally omitted

Race 1

Gun time: 12:00:00   α: 0.25   Finishers: 3   ΣHS: 3.070   Σ(1/TE): 0.00081982
